ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., logistic regression, random forest) */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used in the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  "training_dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training dataset */,
  "validation_dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the validation dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_training_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_validation_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("validation_dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation type */,
  "evaluation_name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluation type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the evaluation type */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the dataset */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the dataset in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., hospital, research study) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* File format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, Parquet) */,
  "data_license" TEXT /* License information if applicable */,
  "data_owner" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_data_owner FOREIGN KEY ("data_owner") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the performance record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the device used for access (e.g., browser, OS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_datasets" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation type */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was used for evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id", "dataset_id", "evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "training_dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training dataset */,
  "validation_dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the validation dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_validation_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("validation_dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_training_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation metric */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance record */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., AUC, Precision, Recall) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Additional details about the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)
